case_title: GUSTAF EMIL UNGA VS. FARRELL INDUSTRIAL ROOFING, INC., A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNGA, GUSTAF EMIL AS TO DEFENDANT FARRELL INDUSTRIAL ROOFING, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UNGA, GUSTAF EMIL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FARRELL INDUSTRIAL ROOFING, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $6,963.25 PRINCIPAL, $21.19 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,164.44, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
